overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a first-person walk through a futuristic urban plaza into a covered neon-lit pedestrian arcade, then exiting onto a sunlit city street with traffic. The environment features wet pavement, yellow neon lighting, digital billboards, and futuristic architecture.

events.description: entering the covered walkway with yellow neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along wet pavement toward the entrance of a covered pedestrian arcade

green leafy trees lining the walkway
dark tunnel entrance with yellow neon lights visible inside
well-maintained grass strip between walkway and building

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a wet pedestrian walkway outside a modern concrete building, approaching a covered arcade entrance. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead as the camera moves toward the yellow-lit tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with neon lighting and digital advertisements

continuous yellow LED strips running along the ceiling and walls
illuminated advertisement screens showing various products and brands
futuristic automated retail machines with glowing displays
thick concrete pillars supporting the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: Walking through a long covered pedestrian arcade illuminated by distinctive yellow neon lights. The walls feature digital billboards and vending machines while moderate crowds of pedestrians move in both directions along the wet tiled floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection beneath elevated highway

events.description: exiting the covered walkway onto the open street with visible traffic
futuristic vehicles including a yellow car drive past on the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered arcade and crossing toward the street level with traffic

dark vehicle with glowing elements passing by on the road

multi-lane asphalt road with moving traffic and crosswalks
various cars with neon underglow and futuristic designs driving past
massive skyscraper with reflective glass facade rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered arcade onto a busy urban street beneath an elevated highway overpass. The scene opens to reveal moving traffic including futuristic vehicles, tall glass skyscrapers, and palm trees lining the street.

events.description: entering bright sunlight area creating strong lens flare and shadows
turning right onto the sidewalk and continuing straight

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit sidewalk past commercial storefronts and digital signage

tropical palm trees lining the edge of the sidewalk
bright morning sunlight streaming between buildings creating lens flare
vertical digital advertisement banners on poles along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit commercial sidewalk with bright morning light streaming between futuristic skyscrapers. The path is lined with palm trees and commercial storefronts featuring glowing digital signage, while the elevated highway recedes behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a damp urban plaza through a neon-lit tunnel and out into a bright, sun-drenched city street. It begins on a wet pedestrian walkway outside a concrete building, moving steadily toward the yellow-lit entrance of a covered arcade. As the camera enters the arcade, the environment shifts into a corridor of yellow neon lights, digital billboards, and vending machines where crowds of pedestrians navigate the wet tiled floors. The scene then opens as the camera emerges from the tunnel onto a busy urban street beneath an elevated highway overpass, revealing futuristic traffic and towering glass skyscrapers. Finally, the lighting transforms from artificial neon to bright morning sunlight as the camera walks along a commercial sidewalk lined with palm trees and glowing storefronts.
